name: New Yankee: The Way of the Knight
short_description: King Arthur has called upon his two most trusted heroes, Sir John and Lady Mary, for another mission. Finally, Merlin’s lies have been revealed. Now, the time has come to set things right.
detailed_description:
HISTORY:

Once again, King Arthur has called upon his two most trusted heroes, Sir John and Lady Mary, for a unique assignment. After years of deceit and mischief, Merlin’s treachery was unmasked, exposing the trail of chaos he left in his wake, including an ominous prophecy about Mordred, the king’s previously exiled nephew. But now, the time has come to set things right. A monumental task lies ahead: our heroes must find Mordred in his hidden valley, guide him through the trials of knighthood, and prepare him to take his rightful place as a knight of Camelot.

You must embark on a journey through enchanted forests, treacherous swamps, and ravaged villages, encountering mythical beasts, and eccentric characters along the way. Teach Mordred the art of swordsmanship, refine his etiquette, and ensure he’s ready for the court. Enable him to rise to the challenge and prove himself a worthy knight. Test your courage and cunning and see if you can overcome the countless trials ahead!

Join the legendary John and Mary as well as their familiar friends in this thrilling adventure. Collect resources, solve captivating puzzles, and save the day in a world where bravery, magic, and treachery collide. Download and play today to forge a new legend for Camelot!

Gameplay

In New Yankee: The Way of the Knight, as in any time manager you have to accurately calculate the time for building, collecting resources and timely use of bonuses.

The game has a large variety of buildings and unique items, collecting them you will perform tasks and participate in unique adventures.

Together with Sir John and Lady Mary , perform a variety of tasks in a wonderful fantasy world, fight dragons, vampires and other fairy tale creatures. But your main mission is to prepare Mordred to become a knight.

Game Features:

Complete 60 levels

14 levels with mini-games

Catchy downloadable Original Soundtrack

Beautiful desktop wallpapers

Separate access to clips, character descriptions and a guide

Earn dozens of achievements

Different equipment for your heroes

Levels strategy guide

Collectible puzzle pieces
